originalTitle: Ekitike to miss rest of season and World Cup - Deschamps
originalDescription: France manager Didier Deschamps confirms striker Hugo Ekitike will miss the rest of the season and World Cup after suffering a suspected Achilles injury during Liverpool's Champions League quarter-final defeat by Paris St-Germain on Tuesday.

originalTitle: Maguire gets extra ban and will miss Chelsea trip
originalDescription: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire will miss Saturday's trip to Chelsea after receiving an additional one-match ban.

originalTitle: Slot says VAR has gone against Liverpool - is he right?
originalDescription: Liverpool's exit from the Champions League was hastened by a VAR intervention. BBC Sport analyses the key refereeing decisions in their season.

originalTitle: Sheff Wed to start next season with 15-point penalty, bidder told
originalDescription: The EFL has informed the preferred bidder for Sheffield Wednesday that the club will start next season in League One with a 15-point penalty.

originalTitle: Are Kompany's Bayern a glimpse at football after Guardiola?
originalDescription: With Vincent Kompany making an impressive impact at Bayern Munich, BBC Sport's tactics expert Umir Irfan takes a closer look at the manager's unique style.

originalTitle: Wood must manage knee issue for the rest of his life
originalDescription: Nottingham Forest striker Chris Wood will have to manage his knee injury for the rest of his life.

originalTitle: Bayern links and World Cup hopes - a big summer for Gordon
originalDescription: Anthony Gordon faces a big summer - with World Cup hopes and the possibility that Newcastle will need to sell him. So what comes next for the England forward?

originalTitle: Two fans get first banning orders for tailgating
originalDescription: Two men become the first in England to be convicted for breaking a new tailgating law at last month's Carabao Cup final.

originalTitle: Arsenal latest: Saka misses out against Sporting
Bayern soon restore lead over Madrid in dramatic start in Munich LIVE!
'Injury more serious than expected' - Alcaraz withdraws from Barcelona Open
originalDescription: Carlos Alcaraz has withdrawn from the Barcelona Open due to a right wrist injury.

originalTitle: 'We aren’t going to listen to anything' - Garcia responds to LIV shutdown rumours
originalDescription: Sergio Garcia said "we aren't going to listen to anything" other than what they are told by LIV Golf's chief amid swirling speculation about the future of the Saudi-backed league.

originalTitle: Man City supporting Semenyo after further racist abuse
originalDescription: Manchester City are understood to be offering Antoine Semenyo support after the forward highlighted further racial abuse he has received this season.

originalTitle: 'I don't need a conversation with Littler' - Van Veen view of PL spat unchanged
originalDescription: Gian van Veen says he does not need a conversation with Luke Littler to try to bury the hatchet after their spat at Night Nine of the Premier League in Manchester.

originalTitle: British doubles legend Jamie Murray retires from tennis
originalDescription: "My tennis journey comes to an end" - Jamie Murray, who became the first British doubles player to rise to world No 1, has announced his retirement from tennis.
